acceptance_criteria: All deliverable files exist at the repo root.
PRD.md byte size matches the source download.
prd_refs: §10.1 lists the full target tree; this task only creates the top-level files. Subdirectories `src/`, `tests/`, `build/`, `docs/`, `examples/` are created on demand by later tasks.
§12.1 item 4–6 require README, LICENSE, and CHANGELOG before publishing.
description: Set up the empty `SlashOps/` repository with the top-level files every PowerShell Gallery module needs. This task is intentionally minimal — `README.md` here is a placeholder; the real install / quickstart / safety README is delivered by `pub-05`. Licensing follows the FxConsole MIT model so the vendored module remains compatible.
notes: Do not commit secrets — `.env`, API keys, etc. are not part of this task and `.gitignore` should already block them.
README content here is deliberately thin so `pub-05` can replace it without merge conflicts.
steps: TDD: `git status` shows the new files staged and no working-tree garbage.
TDD: `.gitignore` excludes `.local-psrepo/`, `*.bak`, `~/.slashops/` test artifacts, `.vscode/` user settings, and `runs/` outputs.
Create `README.md` with a one-paragraph stub pointing to `PRD.md` and `plan/`.
Create `LICENSE` with the MIT license, copyright `(c) 2026 Andre Sharpe`.
Create `.gitignore` excluding build outputs, local PSRepository folders, `coverage.xml`, and IDE files.
Create `.editorconfig` enforcing UTF-8, LF for `*.ps1` / `*.psd1` / `*.psm1` / `*.json` / `*.md`, 4-space indent for PowerShell.
Copy `C:\Users\andre\Downloads\Slashops-PRD_v3.md` into the repo as `PRD.md` (linked living copy is `doc-10`).
Commit nothing — leave the working tree for the user to inspect.
name: [f-01] Initialize repository scaffold
